name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: Arlington, TX's ACE Cash Express at 934 N Collins St provides fast cash and title loans with extended Friday hours until 7PM.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express in Arlington, TX is located at 934 N Collins St, Ste B, in a standalone storefront convenient to downtown Arlington residents. The location is open Monday through Thursday from 9AM to 6PM, Friday from 9AM to 7PM, and Saturday from 9AM to 5PM. Sunday hours are closed. This accessible location serves the Arlington community with reliable hours that extend into early evening on Fridays.

The Arlington ACE Cash Express offers payday loans, title loans, and cash advances to qualifying borrowers in TX. You can contact the location directly at 817-274-5275 to discuss your loan options, verify eligibility, or ask about current terms. Staff can explain the application process and help you understand what documentation you'll need to bring.

If you need quick cash in Arlington, TX, visit ACE Cash Express at 934 N Collins St with a valid photo ID, proof of income, and an active checking account. The store's extended Friday hours make it convenient for working professionals. Quick processing and transparent terms make ACE a straightforward option for short-term cash needs.
address: 934 N Collins St Ste B, Arlington, TX 76011

company_info.headquarters: 934 N Collins St Ste B, Arlington, TX 76011

pros: Multiple funding channels: physical store locations plus online loan options for flexibility
Same-day or next-day funding availability for emergency cash needs
Diverse product offerings including installment loans, title loans, check cashing, and bill payments
Mobile-friendly store locator and customer service accessibility via phone and email
Established national presence with multiple locations suggesting longevity and scale
Money transfer and tax services available at select locations for comprehensive financial needs
cons: Services are not uniformly available across all states—certain loan types unavailable in specific states like Colorado for some products
Website shows technical issues (404 errors on location-specific pages) affecting user experience and information access
Small-dollar loans come with high APRs and fees typical of emergency lending, making these products expensive compared to traditional bank loans
Limited transparency about specific rates and terms visible on public-facing pages
Physical store dependency for some services, limiting accessibility for customers without nearby locations
best_for: Consumers facing unexpected immediate expenses who need same-day or next-day cash access
Individuals needing check cashing, bill payment, or money transfer services without traditional bank accounts
People with collateral (vehicles) who can access title loans when other credit is unavailable
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for consumers in genuine financial emergencies who need immediate cash and cannot access traditional lending quickly. The critical caveat is that these are high-cost products—interest rates and fees are substantially higher than bank loans—so they should be considered emergency-only solutions, not ongoing financial tools.
meta_description: ACE Cash Express at 934 N Collins St, Arlington, TX. Fast payday loans with extended Friday hours until 7PM.
